author: codex
scope: Codex-only relation endpoint-shape rule-or-data triage artifact; deterministic local inspection only; no provider-backed commands, post-ingest LLM harnesses, materialize/export-jsonl/full validate/DB publish, durable data edits, code edits, LOG edits, manifest edits, submissions edits, retired.json edits, or canonical/generated edits

recent_work_not_repeated: next20 validator patch for operates_on_corridor entity->corridor
next21 data cleanup applied as relation046 for has_treatment claim->treatment_component
current_checkpoint_context.inspection_method: Read-only reconstruction from data/canonical/*.jsonl plus data/submission-overrides/retired.json, using the current RELATION_ENDPOINT_SHAPES in packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts. No validate/materialize/export/publish/provider command was run.

remaining_bucket_counts.triage_note: All remaining exact endpoint-shape buckets are singletons. The selected operated_by entity->event row has a direct valid replacement shape: the source-backed Metro-North entity should have a timeline event for opening the Nanuet station shelter. This preserves the existing entity/event records and evidence without widening operated_by.

recommended_data_cleanup.why_data_cleanup: The relation kind is wrong for the endpoints. The source states that Metro-North opened a rebuilt platform shelter, which is event/timeline semantics. The existing endpoint ontology already admits has_timeline_event entity->event, so no validator change is needed.
recommended_data_cleanup.why_not_validator_rule_patch: Allowing operated_by entity->event would make operated_by express agency participation in events, not operation of projects/routes/corridors by an entity. The current operated_by contract should remain project|route|corridor -> entity; event objects should remain invalid for operated_by.

candidate_submissions_to_retire.retire_reason: Malformed relation kind: Metro-North opening a rebuilt shelter is an entity timeline event, not an operated_by relation with an event object.

proposed_semantic_replacement_direction.recommended_label: Metro-North has Nanuet shelter opening timeline event
proposed_semantic_replacement_direction.raw_text_to_reuse: This past Thursday, Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station in Rockland County.

recommended_data_cleanup.replacement_collision_check: Read-only canonical relation lookup found no existing relation between entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and event_nanuet-shelter-opening other than the malformed relation_nanuet-shelter-metronorth. A text search found no existing relation_mnr_has_timeline_event_nanuet_shelter_opening local id.

object.display_name: Nanuet Station Rebuilt Platform Shelter Opening

payload_summary.description: Metro-North opened the Nanuet station platform shelter

representative_records.triage_read: The source-backed event record already captures the opening of the rebuilt Nanuet platform shelter. The relation should attach that event to Metro-North's timeline rather than treating the event as something Metro-North is operated by.

evidence_blocks.summary: States that Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at Nanuet station; describes new amenities, ADA redesign, communications/security additions, and dedication in memory of Orrin Goetz.
evidence_blocks.short_source_quote: Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station

endpoint_records.same_source_support: The canonical entity includes source_id meeting_doc_87686 and local_observation_id entity_mnr_meeting_may2022 from accepted submission sub_cab015e3bdf99834.

endpoint_records.display_name: Nanuet Station Rebuilt Platform Shelter Opening

why_safe: The original relation's endpoints are already accepted canonical records in the same source context.
The proposed replacement uses a currently valid endpoint shape, has_timeline_event entity->event.
The replacement preserves the same source evidence and assertion meaning: Metro-North opened the Nanuet station platform shelter in May 2022.
No validator rule expansion is required, and operated_by remains scoped to project/route/corridor subjects with entity objects.
The cleanup affects one singleton bucket and does not overlap next20, next21, or relation037-relation046 selected buckets.

non_goals: Do not edit packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts or tests for next22.
Do not edit data/submission-overrides/retired.json in this prep lane.
Do not append replacement submissions in this prep lane.
Do not edit data/canonical/*.jsonl, data/canonical.db, data/materialized/*, wiki/*, LOG.md, manifests, or campaign/generated-output files.
Do not run canonicalize, campaign dedup, identity-review, write, ask, schema, ontology-normalize, any provider/profile-backed command, materialize, export-jsonl, full validate, or DB publish.
follow_up_worker_expected_actions: Retire sub_8a68d427e6db5675 with a relation047-style reason referencing this next22 prep artifact.

Append one accepted replacement relation submission with relation_kind has_timeline_event, subject_local_observation_id entity_mnr_meeting_may2022, object_local_observation_id event_nanuet_shelter_opening, and evidence meeting_doc_87686#p009_c0002.

commands_run_read_only: node --input-type=module '<read-only endpoint-shape inventory from canonical JSONL plus retired.json>'

jq -c 'select(.record_id=="relation_nanuet-shelter-metronorth" or .record_id=="entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr" or .record_id=="event_nanuet-shelter-opening")' data/canonical/relations.jsonl data/canonical/entities.jsonl data/canonical/events.jsonl
